name: ✨ Feature Request / Content Suggestion
about: Suggest a new tool, page, translation, or improvement
title: "[FEAT] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

## What would you like to add or improve?
<!-- Clear description of your suggestion -->

## Which page or section does this affect?
<!-- e.g. tools.html, docs/free-tools-guide.md, translations (ID) -->

## Why would this help students?
<!-- Brief explanation of the educational value -->

## Any references or examples?
<!-- Links, screenshots, or code snippets if relevant -->

## Are you willing to contribute a PR?
- [ ] Yes, I can open a PR for this
- [ ] I need guidance to contribute
- [ ] Just suggesting — someone else please pick it up
